notes: Core loop exists with ghost AI, power pellets, and scoring, but the maze rendering uses hollow rectangles instead of proper walls making it look wrong, tunnel wrapping logic is broken (checks wrong coordinates), ghost house logic is flawed, and collision/centering math has issues that make movement feel imprecise and ghosts behave erratically.

A solid but clearly imperfect Pac-Man clone with working core systems and controls, though the maze rendering, ghost-house behavior, and several gameplay details are simplified or inaccurate versus authentic Pac-Man.
